headline: Jim Peters Appointment Signals New Phase For Brown Forman Capital Decisions
summary: Brown-Forman (NYSE:BF.B) has elected Jim Peters as its new Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President. Peters is scheduled to assume the roles on March 31, 2026. He previously held senior leadership positions at Whirlpool Corporation, including CFO and head of enterprise transformation. Brown-Forman, known for its portfolio of distilled spirits, is making this leadership change at a time when the sector is dealing with global trade questions and evolving tariff policies on...
